data.title: The Rising Movement expands CLTRising to NCRising, appoints Jennifer Hamilton as director. Launch in Charlotte in Feb 2026.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on February 19, 2026, The Rising Movement, known for its successful impact in the Charlotte-Mecklenburg area through CLTRising, has unveiled a new initiative called NCRising. This expansion comes after nearly ten years of positive influence and signifies a significant milestone for the organization.

Federal Reserve Board announces it will hold a hybrid public outreach meeting on Thursday, March 26, as part of its review of regulations under the Economic Growth and Regulatory Paperwork Reduction Act (EGRPRA)

data.title: NorthEast Community Bancorp schedules 2026 annual stockholders' meeting.
data.description: A recent report states that the global population has reached approximately 7.9 billion people. Out of this, around 4.7 billion individuals have access to the internet. However, only 53% of the total population actively uses social media platforms, amounting to roughly 4.2 billion people. Among the active social media users, it was found that the average daily time spent on these platforms is 2 hours and 29 minutes. The report also highlights that mobile devices are the most common means of accessing social media, with 99% of users logging in through their smartphones. Additionally, it is noted that social media has a significant influence on purchasing decisions, with 54% of users reporting seeking product information on social platforms.

data.title: Just Bare chicken brand hits $1 billion in annual retail sales in 2025, with 45% growth rate and 13% market share increase. #Pilgrims #Success
data.description: Just Bare, a brand within Pilgrim’s prepared foods portfolio, has exceeded $1 billion in annual retail sales in 2025 with a 45% annual growth rate. It has become a leading force in frozen and fresh chicken categories, holding the #1 position in sales pace within fully cooked chicken. Just Bare's market share has grown from 1% to 13% in three years, with its frozen fully cooked portfolio generating over $750 million in annual sales. The success is attributed to strategic investments in innovation, operational excellence, and consumer-driven growth. Just Bare's Oven Roasted platform with clean-label ingredients has been a hit, appealing to shoppers seeking convenient, high-quality meals. The brand's rapid growth reflects the strength and support of being part of the JBS family, with plans for a new prepared chicken facility in Georgia to meet rising demand. JBS is focused on growing its value-added and prepared foods capabilities globally, with Just Bare leading the way in expanding the prepared foods business across the portfolio.

data.title: Mueller Industries, Inc. increases quarterly dividend by 40% to $0.35 per share, payable on March 27, 2026.
data.description: Mueller Industries, Inc. (NYSE: MLI) from Collierville, Tennessee, has declared a substantial increase in its quarterly dividend for the sixth consecutive year. The Board of Directors approved a regular cash dividend of $.35 per share, which marks a significant 40% rise compared to the prior year's dividend. This dividend will be disbursed on March 27, 2026, to shareholders on record as of March 13, 2026. Mueller Industries, Inc. is an industrial corporation operating in the market.

data.title: Algorand improves coding security post $1.78M breach, releases security framework for AI-assisted blockchain development.
data.description: The Algorand (ALGO) Foundation has recently unveiled a security framework tailored for AI-driven blockchain development. This initiative differentiates between the risky 'vibe coding' method and the more secure 'agentic engineering' practices. This framework aims to enhance the safety and reliability of blockchain development processes. For more details, visit the full article.

data.title: Way.com partners with Chicago Fire FC, providing pre-booked parking for fans at home games. Official Parking Partner.
data.description: A recent collaboration has been established to provide convenient, pre-arranged parking for supporters of Chicago Fire FC during each home game in Chicago. As of February 19, 2026, Way.com revealed its inaugural sports sponsorship by becoming the Official Parking Partner for the soccer team. This partnership with Chicago Fire FC will offer fans...

data.title: allwhere expands with Canada presence, launching a new depot and business entity to offer localized IT support.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, allwhere, a top IT asset management firm, revealed the inauguration of its Canada Depot along with the formation of a Canadian business entity. This strategic move enables allwhere to offer direct, tailored assistance to Canadian customers.

data.title: Code Metal closes $125M Series B funding, led by Salesforce Ventures, at $1.25B valuation. Former Tableau CEO joins.
data.description: In Boston, Code Metal, a top provider of reliable code translation for crucial sectors, revealed the completion of its Series B funding round, securing $125 million. The financing was spearheaded by Salesforce Ventures, with contributions from Accel, B Capital, Smith Point Capital, J2 Ventures, Shield Capital, Overmatch, RTX, and various other investors. Additionally, Ryan Aytay, ex-CEO of Tableau, has been appointed as the President and COO of Code Metal. This investment round follows shortly after.

data.title: Kingland achieves CMMI Level 5 for software development maturity for the fourth time in a row on Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Clear Lake, Iowa, Kingland Systems, a prominent provider of enterprise data, risk, and regulatory software, revealed that it has achieved a successful reappraisal at Maturity Level 5 of the Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI) Institute. This accomplishment showcases Kingland's commitment to excellence and signifies its capability to deliver top-notch services.

data.title: FM buys 10 Memorial Boulevard in Providence to boost connectivity in Rhode Island's innovation economy.
data.description: FM, a commercial property insurer based in Rhode Island, revealed its recent acquisition of 10 Memorial Boulevard in Johnston, RI on February 19, 2026. This investment, situated at the heart of Rhode Island's innovation economy, is expected to enhance FM's connectivity across the region. The move signifies FM's strategic towards reinforcing its presence in the local market.

data.title: APhA Foundation announces 2026 Student Scholarship Program recipients. Honoring student pharmacists.
data.description: The American Pharmacists Association Foundation revealed the 2026 awardees of the Student Scholarship Program on February 19th, 2026. This program acknowledges student pharmacists who contribute their efforts to enhance and promote the pharmacy field.

data.title: Dow Jones drops amid U.S.-Iran tensions after surprise jobless claims, Carvana stock plunges, Etsy soars on deal news.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline as a result of unexpected weekly jobless claims, leading to a significant drop. Carvana stock also plummeted following its earnings report. The market was affected by escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran. On a positive note, Etsy witnessed a surge after news of a new deal. The fluctuating market conditions were further exacerbated by this geopolitical situation.
